description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic pistol with a polygonal, faceted exterior and a two-tone color scheme of dark maroon and pink. The frame features a prominent trigger guard, ergonomic pistol grip, and a rail system under the barrel for mounting accessories. The slide is angular with a rear sight and a small ejection port visible on the side. The magazine is integrated into the grip, and the overall design is compact, suitable for one-handed operation. The surface finish is smooth with a matte sheen, and the materials appear to be primarily polymer with some metal components. The object is detailed and realistic, with clear separation between the slide, frame, and grip.
description: A modern, compact semi-automatic pistol with a faceted maroon and pink finish, ergonomic grip, and accessory rail. The design is sleek and detailed, with visible slide, trigger, and magazine components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the symmetrical, angular slide profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the trigger, trigger guard, slide, ejection port, and accessory rail under the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's contour.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slide, grip, trigger, and accessory rail, with more detail on the grip's ergonomic shape.
